title: Chess Court Badge Candidate Review
human_verdict: Chess Court evidence is fully public and respects all six governance rules with zero violations. Portal mutation receipt exists alongside the update commit; prior Grok counter-receipt explicitly supports conditional badge consideration. No public badge, no live Base/Zora/onchain claim, and no legal authority appear anywhere. The candidate path is clean and receipt-backed. Chess Court is ready for badge candidate design only.

canon_line: Chess Court is the board. Receipts are the moves. Badge candidate may be designed only if evidence supports it. Public badge waits for promotion receipt. Propose pretty. Prove boring.
